category_title: Students with moderate to severe cognitive impairments requiring redirection through interest-based activities
scenario_title: Disengagement and anxiety about missing gym class during music
minimal_context: Chuck is in music class and is supposed to participate in the song 'Look who's here' using bongos.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time to sing 'Look who's here' and play the bongos.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Stops singing) I am not having fun.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please keep trying to participate with the song.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I want to go to gym. I am worried I missed it.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You are expected to participate in music class right now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Not singing) I want to go to gym. I would like to play with a ball.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time to sing 'Look who's here' and play the bongos.

STUDENT: (Stops singing) I am not having fun.

TUTOR: Please keep trying to participate with the song.

STUDENT: I want to go to gym. I am worried I missed it.

TUTOR: You are expected to participate in music class right now.

STUDENT: (Not singing) I want to go to gym. I would like to play with a ball.

task.content: Participate in the song 'Look who's here' using bongos

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: During the song 'Look who's here' while worrying about missing gym class
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Chuck is not singing, and says he is not having fun. He says he wants to go to gym

behavior_patterns.condition: In the course of worrying about gym class
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Chuck mentioned that he would like to play with a ball
related_quotes: would like to play with a ball
